results.title: Did you know that Singapore comedians Gurmit Singh once slept in a bank, and Mark Lee sold rambutans while still in school?
results.description: Long before the spotlight, SG's comedians had humble beginnings, from selling rambutans and sleeping in a bank to working at food stalls and teaching piano lessons This article ( Did you know that Singapore comedians Gurmit Singh once slept in a bank, and Mark Lee sold rambutans while still in school? ) first appeared on The Independent Singapore News .
